name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy plugin for Claude Code — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, in-app bug reports. One install, one MCP registration. All CRUD runs through the shipeasy MCP server or CLI; slash commands are reserved for multi-step workflows (setup, the installs, experiments/metrics create, i18n codemods, ops work + trigger).

plugins.name: shipeasy
plugins.description: End-to-end Shipeasy plugin: base SDK install + auth + bind, plus experiments, metrics, gates, configs, kill switches, alert rules, translations, and feedback. All day-to-day CRUD (create/list/update/archive of gates, configs, kill switches, experiments, metrics, alert rules, ops items, i18n keys) runs through the registered shipeasy MCP server or the shipeasy CLI — there are no per-verb slash commands. Slash commands are reserved for multi-step agent workflows: /shipeasy:setup; the three installs /shipeasy:flags:install (gates+configs+ks+experiments+events+alert rules), /shipeasy:ops:install (feedback+errors+alerts) and /shipeasy:i18n:install (translations); the analyze-and-instrument flows /shipeasy:experiments:create and /shipeasy:metrics:create; the i18n codemods /shipeasy:i18n:{extract,migrate,translate}; and the ops loop /shipeasy:ops:work plus its scheduler /shipeasy:ops:create_trigger. Deletions are UI-only. Registers the shipeasy MCP server. Replaces the deprecated base/experiments-metrics/configs-gates/polylang/bugs plugins.
